name: Links and Drinks Indoor Golf and Sports Bar
about: Links and Drinks Indoor Golf and Sports Bar is an indoor golf venue that combines Full Swing Pro Series simulators with a full-service sports bar and restaurant. The facility uses advanced overhead ION3 cameras and high-speed infrared tracking to deliver a realistic golf experience. Guests can book a bay for simulator play while enjoying signature cocktails and food from the on-site kitchen. The venue offers leagues, events, and private party bookings, making it a versatile spot for both golf and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing Pro Series simulator with realistic ball flight technology
Overhead ION3 cameras and high-speed infrared tracking for accurate shot capture
Full-service bar and restaurant for a complete golf and social experience
Leagues and events for regular play and community engagement

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen serving appetizers, pizzas, and other casual dining options like loaded tots and pizza
Full bar with signature cocktails and a selection of beers

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses overhead ION3 cameras and high-speed infrared tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full-service bar and kitchen, so outside food and drink are not allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but simulator play typically takes 2-3 hours for 18 holes depending on the group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue has a casual sports bar atmosphere and offers family-friendly menu options, making it suitable for kids.
